# Best AI Video Tools for TikTok Ads in 2026

TikTok advertising is booming, but creating scroll-stopping ad creatives is challenging. AI tools help you create viral TikTok ads faster!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: TikTok Ad Editing

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] helps marketers create TikTok-ready ads quickly.

### VEED for TikTok Ads
- **Vertical templates**: Perfect TikTok dimensions
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for TikTok engagement
- **Trending sounds**: Access popular audio tracks

**Try VEED Free**: https://veed.io

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Ad Creative Generation

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] helps create compelling video ad creatives from various sources.

### Pictory for TikTok Ads
- **Script-to-video**: Turn ad scripts into engaging visuals
- **Auto-highlights**: Find the best moments
- **Quick exports**: Get TikTok-ready files fast

**Try Pictory**: {{AFFILIATE_PICTORY}}
